findings.description: The source contains 3 distinct h2-level headings (検索結果件数, ページング, 検索結果) but the knowledge file merges all content into a single section s1. Each source h2 section has substantial content well exceeding 500 characters.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2 headings: '検索結果件数' (with === underline), 'ページング' (with === underline), '検索結果' (with === underline, anchor: ListSearchResult_TableElement)

findings.location: s1 — ページング設定可能な主な属性
findings.description: The constraint that page numbers (ページ番号) cannot be changed is omitted. The source explicitly states this as a bullet point under configurable attributes.
findings.source_evidence: Source: '* ページ番号はページ番号をラベルに使用するため変更不可' — listed as a sub-bullet under configurable paging attributes. Knowledge file lists '各画面要素のラベル（最初・前へ・次へ・最後）' and '現在のページ番号のJSPフラグメントによるカスタマイズ' but omits the non-configurability constraint for ページ番号.
